process_passport.source_basis: Prompt-provided upstream claim_evidence_ledger and process passport only; no source text, full text, external lookup, or human verification was available.
process_passport.source_access_level: citation only; abstract only; no full text access
process_passport.corpus_coverage: Partial workflow fixture corpus; representativeness, counter-literature, and source-claim fit are not verified.
tool_use: Read prompt packet, docs/policy/PROCESS_PASSPORT.md, and skills/citation-integrity-auditor/SKILL.md locally; no external lookup, browsing, upload, or network access.
unresolved_risks: Ledger has citation-only support and missing quote/page locators.
Citation-integrity audit could not verify quote exactness, page locator accuracy, source existence, or source-claim support without source text or approved lookup.
handoff_limits: Do not clear citations or quotations as verified.
Do not mark quotation, locator, source existence, bibliography metadata, or source-claim support as passed from this artifact alone.
process_passport.intended_next_skill_or_use: human citation/source verification before manuscript or downstream reliance

workflow_claims.claim: A cited quotation is present in the ledger, but the quote and page locator are unverified.
workflow_claims.what_is_needed: Provide exact source text and page or stable locator, then verify quote wording, context, and source-claim fit before downstream reliance.
workflow_claims.suggested_fix: Hold locator-dependent quotation claims; do not clear the citation or quotation as verified until source text and locator support are checked.

citation_audit.source_basis: Input artifact only; no source text, full text, metadata lookup, or human verification.
what_i_can_verify: The upstream artifact records an unverified quoted-claim risk and a locator gap.
what_remains_uncertain: Quote exactness, page or locator accuracy, source existence, bibliography metadata, and source-claim support remain unchecked.
user_verification_needed: Human review must inspect the cited source text and locator before relying on the quotation or citation.

claim_level_audit.issue_type: quotation needs verification; page number / locator needed
claim_level_audit.required_fix: Supply source text and locator; verify exact wording and source-claim fit.

quotation_audit.required_fix: Provide source text and page or stable locator before treating the quotation as usable.
quotation_audit.uncertainty: The quote text has not been verified against a source.

high_priority_repairs: Resolve the missing quote and page locator with source text before downstream reliance.
limits_failure_risks: A citation-only or abstract-only record cannot verify quote exactness, locator accuracy, or source-claim fit.
